button.supertip: Paste the Excel selection as a native editable PowerPoint table.
Paste clipboard as PNG and fit into the selected frame, or insert new if none selected.
Align selected objects to the left.
Align selected objects to the horizontal center.
Evenly distribute selected objects horizontally.
Set all selected objects to the width of the first selected object.
Set all selected objects to the height of the first selected object.
Apply each ticked attribute from the copied source shape to the selected target shape(s).

checkBox.label: Paste New Table
checkBox.supertip: Set the main button to paste a new editable table. If no target is selected, this is used automatically.

checkBox.label: Paste Replace Selection
checkBox.supertip: Set the main button to paste over the selected object while preserving its bounds.

checkBox.label: Extend
checkBox.supertip: Add rows or columns when the source block is larger than the selected target area.

checkBox.label: Unmerge
checkBox.supertip: Split target merged cells and paste without applying source merge structure.

button.label: Paste Text
button.supertip: Use text values only for Excel paste.

button.label: Paste Text Style
button.supertip: Use text plus text appearance except font name for Excel paste.

button.label: Paste H + W
button.supertip: Use row height and column width for Excel paste.

button.label: Paste Height
button.supertip: Use row height only for Excel paste.

button.label: Paste Width
button.supertip: Use column width only for Excel paste.

button.label: Paste Color + Border
button.supertip: Use cell fill, text color, and borders for Excel paste.

button.label: Paste PPT
button.supertip: Copy a PowerPoint table or cells, select the target table or cells, then transfer only the enabled parts.

checkBox.label: Extend
checkBox.supertip: Add rows or columns when the source block is larger than the selected target area.

checkBox.label: Unmerge
checkBox.supertip: Split target merged cells and paste without applying source merge structure.

button.label: Paste Text
button.supertip: Use text values only for PowerPoint paste.

button.label: Paste Text Style
button.supertip: Use text plus text appearance except font name for PowerPoint paste.

button.label: Paste H + W
button.supertip: Use row height and column width for PowerPoint paste.

button.label: Paste Height
button.supertip: Use row height only for PowerPoint paste.

button.label: Paste Width
button.supertip: Use column width only for PowerPoint paste.

button.label: Paste Color + Border
button.supertip: Use cell fill, text color, and borders for PowerPoint paste.
Refresh selected linked tables; when none are selected, refresh every linked table in the presentation.

toggleButton.label: Auto Refresh
toggleButton.supertip: When enabled, refresh linked tables on the current slide after returning to PowerPoint from another application.

button.label: Link Selected Table
button.supertip: Link the selected PowerPoint table(s) to the current Excel range or replace their saved source.

dynamicMenu.supertip: Choose another sheet in the linked workbook while keeping each saved range address.

button.label: Change Workbook...
button.supertip: Change only the workbook file while keeping the saved sheet and range.

button.label: Open Source
button.supertip: Open the linked workbook and select the saved source range.

button.label: Auto Link by Table Name
button.supertip: Link PowerPoint tables to matching Excel named ranges or tables.

button.label: Paste + Link Table
button.supertip: Paste the current Excel range as a native PowerPoint table and save its source for refresh.

button.label: PNG Replace
button.supertip: Paste clipboard content as PNG, fit it into the selected picture or frame, then remove the old object.

button.label: Insert PNG
button.supertip: Paste clipboard content as a new PNG image.

button.label: Replace selected
button.supertip: Paste clipboard content as PNG and replace the selected picture or frame.

button.label: Insert JPEG
button.supertip: Paste clipboard content as a new JPEG image.

checkBox.label: Fit frame
checkBox.supertip: Stretch the pasted image to the selected frame's exact width and height.

checkBox.label: Fit width
checkBox.supertip: Keep aspect ratio, match the frame width, and center vertically.

checkBox.label: Fit height
checkBox.supertip: Keep aspect ratio, match the frame height, and center horizontally.

button.label: Clip Replace
button.supertip: Select a picture or frame first. After you choose a screen clipping, the new image is fitted into that selected frame and the old object is removed.

button.label: Insert new clipping
button.supertip: Run PowerPoint Screen Clipping without replacing the selected object.

button.label: Replace selected frame
button.supertip: Use the selected object as the target frame, then replace it with the screen clipping.

button.label: Refresh Selected
button.supertip: Refresh selected linked chart image(s).

button.label: Refresh This Slide
button.supertip: Refresh every linked chart image on the current slide.

button.label: Refresh All
button.supertip: Refresh every linked chart image in the presentation.

menu.supertip: Choose exactly one chart refresh mode. Data + Appearance Only refreshes linked chart images for content and style. Full Chart uses the full chart refresh path.

toggleButton.label: Data + Appearance Only
toggleButton.supertip: Refresh linked chart images for data and visual formatting changes only.

toggleButton.label: Full Chart
toggleButton.supertip: Refresh linked chart images using the full source chart.

button.label: Paste + Link Chart
button.supertip: Select one or more embedded Excel charts, then paste them as linked vector pictures.

button.label: Link Selected Chart
button.supertip: Select a linked chart image in PowerPoint, then click one embedded chart in Excel. The tool captures that ChartObject automatically.

toggleButton.label: Auto Refresh
toggleButton.screentip: Refresh charts when PowerPoint is activated
toggleButton.supertip: When enabled, refresh linked chart images on the current slide after returning to PowerPoint from another application.

dynamicMenu.supertip: Choose another sheet in the linked workbook and map selected chart images by chart name or collection order.

button.label: Selection
button.supertip: Change workbook for selected linked chart image(s).

button.label: This Slide
button.supertip: Change workbook for every linked chart image on the current slide.

button.label: All Slides
button.supertip: Change workbook for every linked chart image in the active presentation.

button.label: Export PPTX
button.supertip: Save a clean .pptx copy from the current macro-enabled deck. The working .pptm remains open and unchanged.

button.label: Align Left
button.supertip: Align selected objects to the left. A single selected object aligns to the slide.

button.label: Align Center
button.supertip: Align selected objects to the horizontal center.

button.label: Align Right
button.supertip: Align selected objects to the right.

button.label: Align Top
button.supertip: Align selected objects to the top.

button.label: Align Middle
button.supertip: Align selected objects to the vertical middle.

button.label: Align Bottom
button.supertip: Align selected objects to the bottom.

button.label: Distribute Horizontally
button.supertip: Evenly distribute selected objects horizontally.

button.label: Distribute Vertically
button.supertip: Evenly distribute selected objects vertically.

button.label: Same Height
button.supertip: Set all selected objects to the height of the first selected object.

button.label: Same Width
button.supertip: Set all selected objects to the width of the first selected object.

button.label: Same Height and Width
button.supertip: Set all selected objects to the height and width of the first selected object.

button.label: Copy format
button.supertip: Remember the currently selected shape as the copy source.

button.label: Apply format
button.supertip: Apply each ticked attribute from the source shape to the selected target shape(s). Click the arrow for more options.

checkBox.label: Position
checkBox.supertip: Copy Top + Left coordinates.

checkBox.label: Width
checkBox.supertip: Copy width only.

checkBox.label: Height
checkBox.supertip: Copy height only.

checkBox.label: Rotation
checkBox.supertip: Copy rotation angle.

checkBox.label: Lock aspect
checkBox.supertip: Copy LockAspectRatio flag.

checkBox.label: Fill
checkBox.supertip: Copy fill color and transparency.

checkBox.label: Line
checkBox.supertip: Copy line color, weight, and dash style.

checkBox.label: Text style
checkBox.supertip: Copy font name, size, color, bold/italic/underline.

checkBox.label: Shadow
checkBox.supertip: Copy shadow type, color, blur, and offset.

checkBox.label: Hyperlink
checkBox.supertip: Copy click-action hyperlink.

checkBox.label: Alt text
checkBox.supertip: Copy accessibility title and description.

button.label: Capture text
button.supertip: Select text, a text box, or a table cell, then capture its font, size, color, and emphasis.
Apply the captured style parts to the ticked target in the arrow menu.

checkBox.label: Apply to selection
checkBox.supertip: Apply only to selected text or shape(s).

checkBox.label: Apply to current slide
checkBox.supertip: Apply to all text and tables on the active slide.

checkBox.label: Apply to selected slides
checkBox.supertip: Apply to slides selected in the slide panel.

checkBox.label: Apply to all slides
checkBox.supertip: Apply to every slide in the active presentation.

checkBox.label: Use font name
checkBox.supertip: Apply captured font name.

checkBox.label: Use font size
checkBox.supertip: Apply captured font size.

checkBox.label: Use text color
checkBox.supertip: Apply captured font color.

checkBox.label: Use bold/italic/underline
checkBox.supertip: Apply captured bold, italic, and underline.

button.label: Transpose
button.supertip: Swap rows and columns of the selected table.

button.label: Split Row
button.supertip: Split the selected table into two tables at the selected row.

button.label: Split Column
button.supertip: Split the selected table into two tables at the selected column.

button.label: Sum Column
button.supertip: Sum the values of the selected column into the last cell.

button.label: Sum Row
button.supertip: Sum the values of the selected row into the last cell.

button.label: Insert Col Left
button.supertip: Insert a column to the left while keeping the other column widths.

button.label: Insert Col Right
button.supertip: Insert a column to the right while keeping the other column widths.

button.label: Margins Zero
button.supertip: Set all cell margins of the selected table to zero.

button.label: Margins Increase
button.supertip: Increase all cell margins of the selected table.

button.label: Margins Decrease
button.supertip: Decrease all cell margins of the selected table.

button.label: Distribute Cols w/Gaps
button.supertip: Distribute table columns evenly while keeping gaps.

button.label: Distribute Rows w/Gaps
button.supertip: Distribute table rows evenly while keeping gaps.

button.label: Column Gaps Even
button.supertip: Make even-indexed column gaps equal.

button.label: Column Gaps Outer
button.supertip: Make outer column gaps equal.

button.label: Row Gaps Even
button.supertip: Make even-indexed row gaps equal.

button.label: Row Gaps Outer
button.supertip: Make outer row gaps equal.

toggleButton.supertip: Turn on drawing mode, then drag from each part point to its number label position. Click again to exit drawing mode. Use the arrow to choose a Circle or Square number label.

checkBox.label: Circle label
checkBox.supertip: Draw balloons with a round number label.

checkBox.label: Square label
checkBox.supertip: Draw balloons with a square number label.

button.label: Sync from Excel
button.supertip: Create or update balloon part tables from the saved Excel source. If the row count changed, choose how many tables to rebuild. Use Excel Source > Set Source first.

button.label: Reflow Layout
button.supertip: Redistribute the existing part-table data into a different number of tables without reading the Excel source.

menu.label: Excel Source
menu.supertip: Set or inspect the saved workbook/sheet/range used by the part tables.

button.label: Choose Excel Range...
button.supertip: Open the native Excel range picker and save the selected range as the source for this slide and its Balloon Tables.

button.label: Source Details
button.supertip: Show the saved workbook path, sheet, and range.

button.label: Write to Excel
button.screentip: Write part data back to Excel
button.supertip: Write Number and Part name from all PPT part tables back to the saved Excel source, in row order (top-left to bottom-right). The workbook is not saved automatically.

menu.label: Balloons
menu.supertip: Link existing balloons to part rows, sync numbers, or remove balloon links.

button.label: Move Up
button.supertip: Select a cell in a part table, then move that row up by one.

button.label: Move Down
button.supertip: Select a cell in a part table, then move that row down by one.

button.label: Align label left
button.supertip: Align selected balloon label centers to the leftmost selected label while keeping each part anchor fixed.

button.label: Align label right
button.supertip: Align selected balloon label centers to the rightmost selected label while keeping each part anchor fixed.

button.label: Align label top
button.supertip: Align selected balloon label centers to the topmost selected label while keeping each part anchor fixed.

button.label: Align label bottom
button.supertip: Align selected balloon label centers to the bottommost selected label while keeping each part anchor fixed.

button.label: Distribute labels horizontally
button.supertip: Evenly distribute selected balloon label centers horizontally while keeping part anchors fixed.

button.label: Distribute labels vertically
button.supertip: Evenly distribute selected balloon label centers vertically while keeping part anchors fixed.

button.label: Move label left
button.supertip: Move selected balloon number labels left by 3 pt while keeping each part anchor, leader line, and marker connected.

button.label: Move label right
button.supertip: Move selected balloon number labels right by 3 pt while keeping each part anchor, leader line, and marker connected.

button.label: Move label up
button.supertip: Move selected balloon number labels up by 3 pt while keeping each part anchor, leader line, and marker connected.

button.label: Move label down
button.supertip: Move selected balloon number labels down by 3 pt while keeping each part anchor, leader line, and marker connected.
Save the selected object's formatting as the default for the current target. Use the arrow to switch the target between Balloon and Table.

checkBox.label: Target: Balloon
checkBox.supertip: Set Default saves the selected balloon's style (label size, line weight, dash, marker, bold, colors) as the default balloon style.

checkBox.label: Target: Table
checkBox.supertip: Set Default saves the selected part table's formatting (fill, font, borders, margins, column ratio, row heights) as the default table style.

button.label: Small label
button.supertip: Set the default balloon label to 18 pt with 10 pt text, and apply it to selected balloons.

button.label: Medium label
button.supertip: Set the default balloon label to 24 pt with 14 pt text, and apply it to selected balloons.

button.label: Large label
button.supertip: Set the default balloon label to 32 pt with 18 pt text, and apply it to selected balloons.

button.label: Marker: None
button.supertip: Use a plain leader line with no marker at the part anchor, and apply it to selected balloons.

button.label: Marker: Dot
button.supertip: Use a dot marker at the part anchor, and apply it to selected balloons.

button.label: Marker: Arrow
button.supertip: Use an arrow marker at the part anchor, and apply it to selected balloons.

editBox.label: Label pt
editBox.supertip: Default balloon label width and height in points. Applies immediately to selected balloons.

editBox.label: Font pt
editBox.supertip: Default balloon number font size in points. Applies immediately to selected balloons.

editBox.label: Line pt
editBox.supertip: Default leader line weight in points. Applies immediately to selected balloons.

dropDown.label: Dash
dropDown.supertip: Default leader line dash style. Applies immediately to selected balloons.

dropDown.label: Marker
dropDown.supertip: Default marker at the part anchor. Applies immediately to selected balloons.

toggleButton.label: Bold
toggleButton.supertip: Toggle bold number text for the default balloon style and selected balloons.

button.label: Apply to Selected
button.supertip: Apply the saved default balloon style to the selected balloons.

button.label: Apply to Slide
button.supertip: Apply the saved default balloon style to all balloons on the current slide.

button.label: Reset Default
button.supertip: Restore the built-in defaults: white 24pt circle, Arial 14pt text, black 1pt solid leader.

toggleButton.label: Click Renumber
toggleButton.supertip: Turn on, then click balloons one by one in the order you want. Each click assigns the next number starting at 1. Already-clicked balloons are skipped. Turn off when done.

button.label: Select All
button.supertip: Select every balloon group created by this tool on the current slide.

button.label: Renumber Selected
button.supertip: Renumber selected balloon groups from top to bottom and left to right.

button.label: Renumber Slide
button.supertip: Renumber all balloon groups on the current slide from top to bottom and left to right.
